title: EX15 2NH, Buddleford Estates Limited: environmental permit issued
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter, decision document and site condition report evaluation template for:   Operator name: Buddleford Estates Limited Installation name: Courtneys Farm Permit number: EPR/CP3030CC/S002  "
